prompt_inputs.goal: Race-week carb-loading for a marathon in 4 days, maintain weight while maximizing glycogen stores

solution_criteria: Plan is for a single day only and stays compact/concise (not overly long or verbose)
Emphasizes high-carbohydrate meals/snacks appropriate for race-week carb-loading (majority of calories from carbs)
Avoids lactose-containing dairy ingredients, or uses lactose-free alternatives
Includes practical timing guidance for meals relative to race day (e.g., lighter fiber/fat intake, hydration notes)
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with an endurance runner training for a marathon who needs high-carb fueling and race-week timing

prompt_inputs.goal: Cutting phase for a strength athlete: lose fat while preserving muscle mass, strict cap of 1800 kcal/day with high protein intake (around 180g)

solution_criteria: Total daily calories stay at or close to the 1800 kcal cap (not significantly exceeding it)
Daily protein total meets or exceeds ~180g
Plan is compact and concise, listing meals for a single day with clear calorie/protein counts per meal
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength athlete on a cutting phase who needs high protein under a strict calorie cap

prompt_inputs.goal: High-volume endurance training for competitive road cycling; needs to maximize protein and iron intake for recovery and performance
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegan (no animal products); must source all protein and iron from plant-based foods only

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains only vegan (plant-based) foods with no animal products
Includes explicit protein sources with reasonable total daily protein intake for an athlete's weight
Includes explicit iron-rich plant foods (e.g., legumes, leafy greens, fortified foods)
Plan is compact and organized into distinct meals/snacks for a single day
task_description: write a compact,concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a vegan competitive cyclist who needs sufficient protein and iron from plant-based sources only
